Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Westward Bound
programme.desc: Learning that Montana is about to become a state and that property values will rise rapidly, Caldwell is using his outlaw gang to force the ranchers off their land. To fight back Tuttle sends for the Trail Blazers and unaware of Maynard's identity, Caldwell appoints him Marshal.

programme.title: The Outlaw 1943
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ notorious Western, The Outlaw, ignites the screen with passion, rivalry, and danger. When outlaw Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he finds himself entangled in a volatile triangle with legendary gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and ruthless lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio McDonald (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who stirs the deadliest conflict of all. A tale of guns, desire, and betrayal, The Outlaw blazes with the daring spirit that made it one of Hollywood’s most talked-about films.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Long Rope
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbor 1968
programme.desc: In Hate Thy Neighbor, Peter Lee Lawrence stars as a young man out for vengeance after his brother is murdered over a cache of stolen gold. His hunt leads him into a ruthless feud between a sadistic outlaw (Horst Frank) and a treacherous schemer (Craig Hill), where cruelty knows no bounds. With brutal showdowns, shifting loyalties, and the grit of Spaghetti Western style, this revenge saga rides hard into the heart of greed and betrayal.

programme.title: White Comanche 1968
programme.desc: In White Comanche, William Shatner takes on a daring double role as twin brothers—one a peace-seeking drifter, the other a ruthless Comanche warrior bent on bloodshed. As the frontier town reels from raids and rising violence, the brothers are set on a collision course that can only end in a deadly showdown. Filled with tense standoffs, frontier action, and Shatner’s commanding presence, this Spaghetti Western delivers a tale of fate, family, and vengeance.
